airfoils.name: NACA 0012
airfoils.description: Symmetric, zero camber. Ideal for aerobatic flight and inverted flying.

airfoils.name: NACA 2412
airfoils.description: Classic general-purpose airfoil. Excellent balance of lift and drag for cruise flight.

airfoils.name: NACA 4412
airfoils.description: Higher camber for increased lift. Suited for payload-carrying aircraft.

airfoils.name: Clark Y
airfoils.description: Flat bottom airfoil, easy to build, forgiving flight characteristics. Popular for trainers.

airfoils.name: NACA 6412
airfoils.description: High camber for maximum lift generation. Good for slow, heavy-payload flight.

airfoils.name: NACA 0009
airfoils.description: Thin symmetric profile, low drag. Ideal for high-speed racing drones.

airfoils.name: NACA 2408
airfoils.description: Thin, low-camber airfoil for speed-focused applications with modest lift needs.

airfoils.name: Eppler 205
airfoils.description: Low Reynolds number optimized. Excellent for slow, efficient glider flight.

airfoils.name: NACA 4415
airfoils.description: Thicker profile with good lift characteristics. Suited for structurally robust heavy-lift wings.

airfoils.name: S1223
airfoils.description: Very high lift airfoil for extreme low-speed, high-payload requirements.

airfoils.name: NACA 0006
airfoils.description: Very thin symmetric airfoil. Minimal drag for maximum speed applications.

airfoils.name: NACA 23012
airfoils.description: Reflexed camber line, good stability characteristics. Suited for general aviation style RC planes.
